name: Greek Eggplant Rounds
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Tomato, cut into 6 (1/4 inch thick) slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange eggplant slices in a single layer on a nonstick baking sheet.
2. Using a pastry brush, lightly brush half of the olive oil over the top of each eggplant slice.
3. Broil 5 to 6 inches from the heat source until the eggplant is lightly browned, about 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Turn the eggplant slices over and brush with the remaining olive oil.
5. Broil until the eggplant is lightly browned again, about 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Spread half of the tahini over each eggplant slice.
7. Top each eggplant slice with one tomato slice.
8. Broil until the tomato is heated through, about 1 minute.
9. Sprinkle each tomato slice with a sixth of the feta cheese, oregano, and pepper.
10. Continue broiling until the cheese is melted and lightly browned, about 1 to 2 minutes.
Makes 2 servings
